debug_info.goal:
V : Type u_1
Pt : Type u_2
inst✝⁴ : NormedAddCommGroup V
inst✝³ : InnerProductSpace ℝ V
inst✝² : MetricSpace Pt
inst✝¹ : NormedAddTorsor V Pt
inst✝ : Fact (finrank ℝ V = 2)
M N A B C D P E F H : Pt
Ω Γ : Sphere Pt
Ω_center_eq_M : Ω.center = M
Γ_center_eq_N : Γ.center = N
Ω_radius_lt_Γ_radius : Ω.radius < Γ.radius
A_mem_inter : A ∈ Metric.sphere Ω.center Ω.radius ∩ Metric.sphere Γ.center Γ.radius
B_mem_inter : B ∈ Metric.sphere Ω.center Ω.radius ∩ Metric.sphere Γ.center Γ.radius
A_ne_B : A ≠ B
M_ne_N : M ≠ N
C_mem_inter : C ∈ ↑(affineSpan ℝ {M, N}) ∩ Metric.sphere Ω.center Ω.radius
D_mem_inter : D ∈ ↑(affineSpan ℝ {M, N}) ∩ Metric.sphere Γ.center Γ.radius
sbtw_C_M_N_D : List.Sbtw ℝ [C, M, N, D]
affineIndependent_ACD : AffineIndependent ℝ ![A, C, D]
P_eq_circumcenter : P = { points := ![A, C, D], independent := affineIndependent_ACD }.circumcenter
E_mem_inter : E ∈ ↑(affineSpan ℝ {A, P}) ∩ Metric.sphere Ω.center Ω.radius
E_ne_A : E ≠ A
F_mem_inter : F ∈ ↑(affineSpan ℝ {A, P}) ∩ Metric.sphere Γ.center Γ.radius
F_ne_A : F ≠ A
affineIndependent_PMN : AffineIndependent ℝ ![P, M, N]
H_eq_orthocenter : H = Triangle.orthocenter { points := ![P, M, N], independent := affineIndependent_PMN }
⊢ ∃ (affineIndependent_BEF : AffineIndependent ℝ ![B, E, F]),
    { points := ![B, E, F], independent := affineIndependent_BEF }.circumsphere.IsTangent
      (AffineSubspace.mk' H (affineSpan ℝ {A, P}).direction)

          (H := H) (l := line[ℝ, A, P]) ))
  · by_cases hBF : B = F
    · subst hBF
      refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
      · simpa using (affineIndependent_iff.2 (by
          intro i j hij
          fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> simpa at hij))
      · simpa using (by
          classical
          simpa using (Triangle.circumsphere_isTangent_mk'_direction
            (T := (⟨_, (by
              simpa using (affineIndependent_iff.2 (by
                intro i j hij
                fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> simpa at hij)))⟩ : Triangle ℝ Pt))
            (H := H) (l := line[ℝ, A, P]) ))
    ·
      refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
      ·
        have hEF : E ≠ F := by
          intro h
          subst h
          exact hBE (by
            have : B = E := by rfl
            exact this)
        exact affineIndependent_of_ne_of_ne_of_ne hBE hBF hEF
      ·
        simpa using (by
          classical
          simpa using (Triangle.circumsphere_isTangent_mk'_direction
            (T := (⟨_, (affineIndependent_of_ne_of_ne_of_ne hBE hBF (by
              intro h
              subst h
              exact F_ne_A (by
                have : F = A := by rfl
                exact this)) )⟩ : Triangle ℝ Pt))
            (H := H) (l := line[ℝ, A, P]) ))
